ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Aster DM Quality Care Limited has finalized a significant share allotment, issuing 353.55 million new equity shares to shareholders of the erstwhile Quality Care India Limited as part of their NCLT-approved amalgamation. This material transaction increases the company's total issued share capital by approximately 68% (from 518 million to 871 million shares), leading to substantial dilution for existing shareholders. While representing a crucial post-merger integration step, no immediate red flags are evident beyond the expected dilution inherent in such a large-scale corporate restructuring.
